What’s the difference between a Basic Sa: What’s the difference between a Basic Sale and Unlimited Sale?
In the Basic Sale, every user can commit: In the Basic Sale, every user can commit a maximum of about 100 USD worth of MARCO-BNB LP Tokens. We calculate the maximum LP amount about 30 minutes before each IFO. The Basic Sale has no participation fee.
In the Unlimited Sale, there’s no limit: In the Unlimited Sale, there’s no limit to the amount of MARCO-BNB LP Tokens you can commit. However, there’s a fee for participation: see below.
Which sale should I commit to? Can I do: Which sale should I commit to? Can I do both?
You can choose one or both at the same t: You can choose one or both at the same time! If you’re only committing a small amount, we recommend the Basic Sale first. Just remember you need a Melega DEX Profile in order to participate.
How much is the participation fee?: How much is the participation fee?
There’s only a participation fee for the: There’s only a participation fee for the Unlimited Sale: there’s no fee for the Basic Sale.
The 1% participation fee decreases in cl: The 1% participation fee decreases in cliffs, based on the percentage of overflow from the “Unlimited” portion of the sale.
Where does the participation fee go?: Where does the participation fee go?
We burn it. The MARCO-BNB LP tokens from: We burn it. The MARCO-BNB LP tokens from the participation fee will be decomposed. We will then use the BNB portion to market buy the MARCO equivalent, and finally throw all of the MARCO into the weekly token burn.
How can I get an achievement for partici: How can I get an achievement for participating in the IFO?
You need to contribute a minimum of abou: You need to contribute a minimum of about 10 USD worth of MARCO-BNB LP Tokens to either sale.
You can contribute to one or both, it do: You can contribute to one or both, it doesn’t matter. Only your overall contribution is counted for the achievement.

then register for the competition by cli: then register for the competition by clicking “I WANT TO BATTLE” button above.
Trade BNB/BUSD, MARCO/BNB, ETH/BNB and B: Trade BNB/BUSD, MARCO/BNB, ETH/BNB and BTCB/BNB during the battle period to raise both your and your team’s score. See the Rules section below for more.
Teams and traders will be ranked in the: Teams and traders will be ranked in the order of trading volume. Collect your prizes and celebrate!

Team ranks are calculated by the total c: Team ranks are calculated by the total combined volume of the top 500 members of each respective team.

MelegaSwap can and will disqualify any t: Melega DEX can and will disqualify any team or specific members that are proven to have taken malicious action or attempt to “cheat” in any way.

Tickets must match the winning number in: Tickets must match the winning number in the exact same order, starting from the first digit.
“000006” matches the last digit, but sin: “000006” matches the last digit, but since the first five digits are wrong, it doesn’t win any prizes.
If the digits on your tickets match the: If the digits on your tickets match the winning numbers in the correct order, you win a portion of the prize pool.
Prices are set when the round starts, eq: Prices are set when the round starts, equal to 5 USD in MARCO per ticket.
There are two draws every day: one every: There are two draws every day: one every 12 hours.
Once the round’s over, come back to the: Once the round’s over, come back to the page and check to see if you’ve won!
The digits on your ticket must match in: The digits on your ticket must match in the correct order to win.
Here’s an example lottery draw, with two: Here’s an example lottery draw, with two tickets, A and B.
Ticket A: The first 3 digits and the las: Ticket A: The first 3 digits and the last 2 digits match, but the 4th digit is wrong, so this ticket only wins a “Match first 3” prize.
Ticket B: Even though the last 5 digits: Ticket B: Even though the last 5 digits match, the first digit is wrong, so this ticket doesn’t win a prize.
The prizes for each lottery round come f: The prizes for each lottery round come from three sources:
100% of the MARCO paid by people buying: 100% of the MARCO paid by people buying tickets that round goes back into the prize pools.
After every round, if nobody wins in one: After every round, if nobody wins in one of the prize brackets, the unclaimed MARCO for that bracket rolls over into the next round and are redistributed among the prize pools.
10,000 MARCO from the treasury is added: 10,000 MARCO from the treasury is added to a lottery round every other day. This MARCO is of course also included in rollovers! Read more in our guide to
how to play the MelegaSwap lottery!: how to play the Melega DEX lottery!
Prize brackets don’t ‘stack’: if you mat: Prize brackets don’t ‘stack’: if you match the first 3 digits in order, you’ll only win prizes from the ‘Match 3’ bracket, and not from ‘Match 1’ and ‘Match 2’.
Buying multiple tickets in a single tran: Buying multiple tickets in a single transaction gives a discount. The discount increases in a linear way, up to the maximum of 100 tickets:

Community Farm qualifiers will be asked: Community Farm qualifiers will be asked to provide the address of the wallet which you’ll use for bidding MARCO in the auction.
Core Farm/Pool qualifiers will receive f: Core Farm/Pool qualifiers will receive further directions separately.
During the auction period, if you connec: During the auction period, if you connect your project’s whitelisted wallet to the Auction page, you’ll see a “Place Bid” button during when the auction is live.
You can then commit MARCO to bid during: You can then commit MARCO to bid during the auction, competing against other project for one of the available farms.
If your bid was not successful, you can: If your bid was not successful, you can reclaim your MARCO on this page.
If your bid was successful, your farm wi: If your bid was successful, your farm will begin at the specified time. The MARCO you bid will not be returned to you and will be added to our weekly MARCO burn.
So long as you are whitelisted, you’ll b: So long as you are whitelisted, you’ll be able to participate in each new auction.
If two or more projects bid the exact sa: If two or more projects bid the exact same MARCO amount and are contending for a spot in the winning bidders, their bids may be invalidated.
Each week, qualifying projects can bid M: Each week, qualifying projects can bid MARCO for the right to host a 7-day Farm on Melega DEX.
